applied.title: Head of PMO & Strategic Operations
applied.jd_text: We’re Hiring: Head of PMO & Strategic Operations 🇨🇾 | 🇦🇪 Location: Limassol, Cyprus OR Dubai, UAE (Hybrid/On-site) Reports to: Chief Operating Officer (COO) Department: Operations / PMO Start-Date ASAP *** FinTech, Payment, PSP, Background Required*** About the Role: As the Head of PMO, you’ll be the central point for the COO, turning strategic vision into a structured, visible, and predictable execution roadmap. You’ll oversee the end-to-end Payment Integration Lifecycle, coordinating the high-stakes intersection of Product, Engineering, Sales, and Compliance. What You’ll Do: -Strategic Oversight: Serve as the COO’s “Single Source of Truth,” delivering executive-level insights via dashboards (Jira/Monday/Tableau) and weekly syncs with department heads. -Integration & Product Delivery: Own PSP/Bank integrations from API review to Production Go-Live. Standardize processes to reduce Time-to-Market for new payment rails. -Operational Excellence: Proactively manage at-risk projects, align with regulatory standards (PCI DSS, PSD2), and ensure agile governance across teams. Who We’re Looking For: -5+ years in Project/Program Management, with 3+ in Fintech/Payments; 1+ years leading teams of 2+. -Strong technical literacy in API architectures, Webhooks, and payment flows. -Expert in Jira/Confluence and PMO software. -Degree in Business, Engineering, or Computer Science; PMP, PRINCE2, or Agile certifications preferred. Willingness to adapt to new locations and immerse in the fintech ecosystem. If you’re passionate about driving operational excellence in a fast-paced payments environment and turning strategy into action, we want to hear from you! Are you interested in helping shape the future of payments? Please apply...

applied.title: Director- Data Analytics (CDU3) - 20004846

The successful candidate will oversee the development and implementation of advanced analytical frameworks, data governance structures, and reporting mechanisms that align with Qiddiya's strategic objectives. Applications closing 9th March 2026. applied.title: Head of CRM (Next-Gen, AI-Driven)
applied.jd_text: We are Global Print-on-Demand (Global POD), the Dubai-based subsidiary of The Customization Group . We bring cutting-edge and scalable top-tier print-on-demand solutions to businesses and creators worldwide. Fast, sustainable, and hassle-free — because your vision deserves the best! The Customization Group is a global leader in mass customization, leveraging AI and automation to revolutionize the personalized products industry. With a strong international presence across Europe, North America, and the Middle East , we manufacture up to 2.500.000 unique products daily , reaching millions of customers through 20+ own online shops and 1,000+ partner stores . Our AI-first strategy drives efficiency, scalability, and innovation , keeping us ahead in a fast-moving market while growing through AI-driven acquisitions and partnerships . Our diverse team of 700+ professionals from 40+ nationalities thrives in a culture of collaboration and ambition. Whether in our tech hubs, production facilities, or business locations, you’ll find the perfect environment to take ownership and drive impact in the future of e-commerce. TCG is looking for an exceptional Head of CRM to lead the transformation of our global customer engagement strategy. You’ll drive intelligent automation, experimentation, and data-led innovation across all brands and markets. Why You Will Love Working With Us Competitive salary – Commission & performance-based bonuses! Global Exposure – Work with an international team and gain valuable cross-market experience Rapid Career Growth – A role that evolves quickly, opening doors to new opportunities Supportive Work Environment – Join a dynamic and collaborative team culture Ownership for your ideas to fuel your ambition Private Health Insurance A modern office in Dubai Internet City About The Role As our Head Of CRM , you’ll set the global vision and lead two teams - CRM Marketing and CRM Automations - toward a world where customer experiences are personalized, anticipatory, and continuously optimized with AI and automation. You'll build a modern CRM ecosystem that uses data, experimentation, and smart technology to deepen customer relationships and deliver predictable, scalable revenue. This includes championing new tools, integrating emerging AI capabilities, streamlining workflows, and raising the bar on quality, speed, and impact. applied.title: Head of Operations & AI Optimisation
applied.location: Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
applied.jd_text: Head of Operations & AI Optimisation The Head of Operations & AI Optimisation is responsible for leading the strategic and day to day performance of the contact centre, ensuring exceptional service delivery, operational efficiency, and continuous improvement across all customer touchpoints. This role combines traditional operations leadership with advanced responsibility for AI strategy, automation, and digital transformation. The role is to drive the evolution of a modern, technology enabled contact centre by integrating AI models, conversational automation, data driven decision-making, and workforce augmentation tools to create scalable, high performance operations. Leadership and Team Management • Lead end-to-end contact centre operations, ensuring delivery of service level agreements (SLAs), customer satisfaction, and commercial targets. • Oversee overall team performance and ensure adherence to KPIs. • Provide coaching, feedback, and professional development opportunities consistently. • Lead by example with emotional intelligence, empathy, balance, and strong decision-making skills. • Execute plans to continuously improve contact centre operations, focusing on enhancing people, processes, technology, and data capabilities. • Ensure alignment of operations with the strategic objectives of partners, internal and external clients. • Oversee the implementation of resource planning, workforce management, and operational forecasting within the team. • Implement performance frameworks and KPIs to drive accountability and high standards. • Partner with cross-functional teams (Customer Experience, IT, Product, Commercial) to align operational improvements with business goals. AI & Automation Strategy • Own the AI transformation roadmap for the contact centre, including conversational AI, agent assist, predictive insights, and automation. • Evaluate emerging AI technologies that enhance agent productivity, reduce cost-to-serve, and elevate customer experience. • Lead deployment, testing, optimisation, and scaling of AI solutions such as: o Voice and chat bots o AI powered routing engines o Agent assist / knowledge AI o Workforce AI forecasting & scheduling tools o Customer intent prediction models People Leadership • Lead, mentor, and develop teams including operations, quality, training, AI operations, and digital optimisation. • Champion a culture of innovation, customer-centricity, and measurable outcomes. • Create AI literacy and upskilling programmes for frontline staff and leaders. Customer & Experience Focus • Ensure a seamless and consistent omnichannel experience across voice, chat, email, messaging apps, and social channels. • Reduce customer effort by simplifying processes and leveraging automation. • Use analytics and customer insights to proactively address pain points. Risk, Compliance & Governance • Ensure all operations and AI implementations meet regulatory, ethical, and privacy guidelines. • Establish governa

applied.title: Principal Data & AI – FinTech / InsurTech | UAE (Dubai)
applied.jd_text: New Role: Principal Data & AI – FinTech / InsurTech | UAE (Dubai) 🇦🇪 - Dubai (UAE visa preferred) - Open to European candidates relocating - 40,000 – 45,000 AED/month ***Can be remote until current situation in UAE gets better*** Talent Connect Group (TCG) has just partnered with a high-growth FinTech/InsurTech firm building the next generation of AI-powered underwriting technology and they’re hiring a Principal Data & AI Leader to drive it. This is a critical, senior leadership hire where you’ll own the delivery of a next gen AI platform already supporting a live product used in production. The Opportunity... You’ll lead the evolution of an AI-driven underwriting platform owning everything from strategy → execution → stakeholder management. This is not a theory role... They need someone who has built, shipped, and scaled AI systems in production. What You’ll Be Doing - Lead and scale a multidisciplinary team (Data, AI/ML, Full-Stack, Front-End) - Own end-to-end delivery, governance, and reporting to senior leadership - Drive the next phase of AI & LLM integration (automation, chatbots, intelligent workflows) - Partner closely with business stakeholders to translate AI into real commercial impact Tech Environment - ERP: SAP (HANA essential | XSA / BTP a plus) - Cloud: AWS (primary) + Azure - Data Platforms: Snowflake / Databricks - AI Focus: Production-grade AI + LLM applications What They’re Looking For - 10+ years in AI / Data with a strong hands-on engineering background - Proven experience leading engineering/data teams (not consultancy-only) - Track record of building and deploying AI/LLM solutions in production - Comfortable owning senior stakeholder communication & governance - Still close enough to the tech to get hands-on when needed - Not suited to founders / consultants — must be currently embedded in an organisation If this is the role for you, please get in touch with your CV
